prompt: A sleek, professional bug bounty badge design for a cybersecurity challenge. Dark navy background with subtle matrix code rain in the background. Central hexagonal shape with glowing cyan edges containing the text 'GPT-5.5 BIO BUG BOUNTY'. Below the hexagon, a horizontal DNA helix strand crossing a binary sequence. Around the edges, small icons representing biosecurity: microscope, petri dish, virus cell, DNA strand. A red ribbon overlays the bottom right corner. Professional security conference badge style, clean vector art, award seal aesthetic. White and cyan text on dark background. Minimalist, official-looking.
